dod: [BEHAVIOR] cd packages/brain && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' npx vitest run tests/ws1/harness-happy-path-marker.test.js --reporter=default 2>&1 | grep -qE 'Test Files\s+1 passed'

[BEHAVIOR] node --input-type=module -e "const m=await import('./packages/brain/src/harness-happy-path-marker.js'); if (m.HARNESS_HAPPY_PATH_MARKER!=='fe91ce26-5nodes-verified') process.exit(1); if (m.verifyHarnessHappyPath()!==m.HARNESS_HAPPY_PATH_MARKER) process.exit(1)"
